title: 小星星借灯

characters.name: 小兔圆圆
characters.visual: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes

characters.name: 小星星
characters.visual: a tiny star with a shimmering silver body, glowing softly, and a gentle, kind expression

characters.name: 风婆婆
characters.visual: an elderly woman with flowing silver hair, a gentle smile, and a light blue robe

characters.name: 月亮姐姐
characters.visual: a feminine figure with a crescent moon face, silver hair, and a soft, warm glow

characters.name: 小猫团团
characters.visual: a fluffy cat with round golden eyes, a black nose, and a striped tail

characters.name: 小松鼠
characters.visual: a small squirrel with brown fur, a bushy tail, and a tiny red cap

characters.name: 小刺猬
characters.visual: a spiky hedgehog with dark brown fur, a pointed snout, and a black nose

style: children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 夜晚来了，月亮慢慢爬上天空，把柔柔的光洒在森林里。
scenes.prompt: a feminine figure with a crescent moon face, silver hair, and a soft, warm glow, slowly rising into the night sky, casting a gentle silvery light over a forest of tall trees with dark silhouettes, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 小兔圆圆洗好了脸，刷好了牙，钻进暖暖的小被窝。
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes, snuggled in a cozy bed with soft white bedding, paws tucked under, a small lamp casting warm golden light on the bedroom wall, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 她看见窗外有一颗小星星，一闪一闪，像在轻轻眨眼睛。
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes peeking out of her window, looking up at a tiny star with a shimmering silver body, glowing softly, and a gentle, kind expression floating in the night sky, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 圆圆小声问：‘小星星，你为什么还不睡呀？’
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes whispering toward the night sky, a tiny star with a shimmering silver body, glowing softly, and a gentle, kind expression looking down with twinkling eyes, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 小星星也小声回答：‘我的小灯有一点暗了。我怕照不到回家的路。’
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes sitting up in bed, looking at a tiny star with a shimmering silver body, glowing softly, and a gentle, kind expression, holding a small glowing lamp in its paws, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 圆圆听了，坐了起来。她想了想，从床头拿出一盏小纸灯。
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes sitting up in bed, reaching toward the bedside table where a small paper lamp with red flower and green leaf designs rests, golden light glowing from the lamp, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 风婆婆从森林那边慢慢走来了。风婆婆走得很轻很轻，连树叶都没有吵醒。
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes sitting on her windowsill, an elderly woman with flowing silver hair, a gentle smile, and a light blue robe moving silently through the forest, her presence causing no disturbance to the trees, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 小纸灯慢慢飘了起来。它飘出窗子，飘过院子，飘过高高的树梢。
scenes.prompt: a tiny star with a shimmering silver body, glowing softly, and a gentle, kind expression, a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes watching as a small paper lamp with red flower and green leaf designs floats out of the window, passing through a quiet courtyard and rising past tall trees with glowing leaves, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 小纸灯飘过白白的云朵，飘到小星星身边。小星星接过小纸灯，开心地笑了。
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes looking up at a tiny star with a shimmering silver body, glowing softly, and a gentle, kind expression, as the paper lamp with red flower and green leaf designs gently lands in its hands, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 圆圆的房间被银光笼罩，她问小星星：‘你现在能回家了吗？’
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes lying in bed, surrounded by silvery light from the paper lamp, looking up at a tiny star with a shimmering silver body, glowing softly, and a gentle, kind expression, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 圆圆梦见自己坐在一片软软的云朵上。小星星提着小纸灯，走在她前面。
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes sitting on a soft, puffy cloud, looking up at a tiny star with a shimmering silver body, glowing softly, and a gentle, kind expression walking ahead with a paper lamp, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words

scenes.story_text: 梦里，小星星站在云朵上，对她轻轻挥手。它说：‘圆圆，谢谢你。’
scenes.prompt: a small rabbit with fluffy white fur, pink nose, and wide, curious eyes lying in bed, dreaming as a tiny star with a shimmering silver body, glowing softly, and a gentle, kind expression stands on a cloud, waving its glowing arm toward the rabbit, children's book illustration, watercolor style, soft colors, whimsical, no text, no letters, no words
